title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MATERNITY AND CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL
TO DR. JOSE FABELLA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 12063 / 65 OG No. 23, 5826 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5294, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MATERNITY AND CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL

TO DR. JOSE FABELLA MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in

Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Maternity and Children's Hospital in the City of Manila under the Department of Health is hereby changed to Dr. Jose Fabella Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
